property.name: endpointUrl
property.label: Start Session Endpoint URL
property.description: REST endpoint used to start a new Agentforce chat session.

property.name: messagesEndpointUrl
property.label: Messages Endpoint URL
property.description: REST endpoint (or base URL) used to post chat messages after a session is created. When omitted, the component derives this value from the start session endpoint.

property.name: botId
property.label: Bot ID
property.description: Identifier for the Agentforce bot to contact.
